discovery.summary: Three improvements to the feature workflow system: (1) Codex Orchestrator guide document, (2) CLAUDE.md handoff protocol, (3) runner support for [CHECKPOINT] markers in tasks.md for scoped diff review. Model notes: codex-5.4-mini, gemini-2.5-pro, serial Gemini calls only.

delivery.note: Implementation committed directly to main (no PR branch) — workflow delivered at commit 62666fc.
